description_long: This object is a modern potted plant featuring a white cylindrical pot elevated on a minimalist metal stand with four slender legs. The pot is filled with white pebbles, from which a single green stem rises, supporting a graceful arch of white orchid flowers with yellow centers. The plant has several broad, glossy green leaves that extend horizontally from the base, adding to its lush appearance. The pot itself has a smooth, glossy finish and a black rim at the top, giving it a contemporary aesthetic. The overall design is clean and elegant, suitable for both indoor and outdoor urban environments. No visible decorative patterns are present on the pot, emphasizing its sleek and understated style.
description: A white orchid plant with broad green leaves in a glossy white cylindrical pot on a minimalist metal stand, filled with white pebbles and topped with a black rim.
description_view_0: Front view showing the arching white orchid flowers, broad green leaves, and the full height of the pot and stand.
description_view_1: Rear angled view highlighting the back of the orchid flowers and the arrangement of the leaves, with the metal stand visible.
description_view_2: Alternate front view similar to view 0, with a clear look at the orchid flowers and the pot's clean lines.
description_view_3: Side view focusing on the profile of the orchid stem and the distribution of the leaves around the pot.
